benchmark_scope: Framing-stage runtime evidence for request clarification, reframing, and readiness to proceed into planning.

families.summary: Positive runtime proofs now show that both fast-track and deep-path runs produce a framed request before planning proceeds.
covered_expectations: need/intent/context become framed before planning continues
framing completion is preserved in the auditable proof artifact

families.summary: External context change can reopen a previously framed session back into clarification, so framing is not treated as irrevocably green once human-facing constraints change.
covered_expectations: framing can be reopened by a human-facing signal
reframing remains part of the runtime artifact chain

remaining_gap: wrong-problem-definition negative families are still not benchmarked as first-class recorded verdicts
framing coverage remains partial even though benchmark families now exist
